data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Simplifies choices to reduce decision time and enhance user experience.
data.technical_spec: Streamlined interface, category-based menus, personalized recommendations.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Designs interactive elements for ease of use based on size and distance.
data.technical_spec: Large clickable buttons, intuitive layout structure, touch-friendly designs.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Groups related items close to one another to create logical connections and improve navigation.
data.technical_spec: Video thumbnails and titles, grouped playlists, consistent layout patterns.

data.title: Law of Similarity
data.description: Uses visual similarities to denote relationships among elements.
data.technical_spec: Consistent color schemes for related content, uniform icons for actions, unified style guides.

data.title: Serial Position Effect
data.description: Capitalizes on the tendency to better recall items at the beginning and end of a list.
data.technical_spec: Highlighted beginning and end content sections, suggested videos carousel, prioritized viewing history placement.
